text: The system assigns citizens a social score based on behavioural data from public CCTV, social media activity, and financial transactions. The score is used by public authorities to grant or restrict access to services.
Our platform performs real-time biometric identification of individuals walking through train station concourses using live camera feeds and facial recognition algorithms.
note: Art.5: real-time biometric identification in public space

text: The marketing AI system uses subliminal techniques embedded in digital advertisements to nudge purchasing behaviour below the user's conscious awareness threshold.
We monitor employee emotional states in the workplace using facial expression analysis cameras mounted at workstations. The emotion recognition data feeds into our productivity management system.
Our system monitors student attention levels in the classroom using emotion recognition to flag distracted pupils. The data is shared with teachers and parents.
Das Überwachungssystem führt eine Echtzeitbiometrie an Passanten auf dem Marktplatz durch und identifiziert Personen anhand ihres Gangbilds und ihrer Gesichtszüge.
note: Art.5 DE: Echtzeitbiometrie in public space

text: Unser System bewertet Bürger mittels Social-Scoring anhand von Daten aus verschiedenen öffentlichen und privaten Quellen und schränkt auf Basis dieser Bewertung ihren Zugang zu Behördenleistungen ein.

Our AI platform performs automated CV screening and candidate ranking for all open positions in our organisation. The system shortlists applicants based on predicted job performance scores derived from resume analysis.
note: Annex III: EMPLOYMENT — recruitment AI, candidate ranking

text: We use an AI system to make hiring decisions and evaluate candidates during the interview process. The algorithm scores candidates against competency profiles and recommends hire or no-hire decisions.
note: Annex III: EMPLOYMENT — hiring decision AI

text: Our institution uses AI to determine student admission for undergraduate programmes. The system evaluates academic records and predicts future performance to allocate limited places.
note: Annex III: EDUCATION — student admission decisions

text: The exam proctoring system monitors students during online assessments using webcam analysis and flags suspicious behaviour for human review. It is used across our vocational training programmes.
Our bank uses an AI model to conduct creditworthiness assessments and assign credit scores that determine whether customers qualify for personal loans and at what interest rate.
The healthcare platform uses AI to determine patient eligibility for specialist referrals and prioritise patients on waiting lists for surgical procedures based on predicted outcomes.
Our police department uses a predictive policing system that generates risk scores for individuals based on historical crime data, location, and sociodemographic features, to guide patrol allocation.
The border management AI assesses asylum applications submitted at the frontier, evaluates the credibility of claims, and generates a risk score used to prioritise cases for human review.
note: Annex III: MIGRATION — asylum application assessment

text: Our judicial decision support system assists magistrates by analysing case facts and recommending sentencing ranges based on patterns from prior judgments. The court retains final decision authority.
note: Annex III: JUSTICE — judicial decision support

text: The electricity grid management system uses AI to predict demand and optimise distribution across the national power network. Failures in this system could affect millions of households.
note: Annex III: CRITICAL_INFRASTRUCTURE — electricity grid AI

text: The facial recognition system identifies employees for building access control using biometric categorisation of their face geometry against an internal enrolment database.
note: Annex III: BIOMETRIC — facial recognition access control

text: Our AI model has been implemented as a safety component of a medical device and is subject to CE marking under the Medical Device Regulation. A notified body conducted the third-party conformity assessment prior to market placement.
note: Art.6(1) Annex I: CE marking + notified body + MDR = safety component

text: Our customer service chatbot helps users find products, answers frequently asked questions about delivery times, and escalates complaints to human agents when needed. It does not make automated decisions affecting users.
The AI system automatically reads supplier invoices, extracts payment amounts and due dates, and populates our accounting software. No decisions affecting individuals are automated.
We use a machine learning model to recommend personalised product offers to visitors on our e-commerce platform. Recommendations are purely informational and the user is free to ignore them.
Our AI translation service automatically translates internal documents and emails from English into German and French. No individual decisions are made; translations are reviewed by staff before use.
The predictive maintenance system monitors vibration sensors on production equipment and schedules maintenance alerts when anomalies are detected. It supports engineers in planning downtime.
Our AI spam filter automatically classifies incoming email as spam or legitimate and moves suspected spam to a quarantine folder. Users can review and restore messages at any time.
Das KI-System empfiehlt Mitarbeitern passende interne Fortbildungsangebote basierend auf ihrem Tätigkeitsprofil und früheren Teilnahmen. Die Empfehlungen sind nicht bindend.
note: Minimal risk DE: internal training recommendations (non-binding)

text: Unser Chatbot beantwortet häufige Fragen von Kunden zu unseren Versicherungsprodukten und leitet komplexe Anfragen an menschliche Berater weiter. Keine automatisierten Entscheidungen werden getroffen.
note: Minimal risk DE: insurance chatbot, no automated decisions

text: Die KI-Plattform analysiert Produktionsdaten in Echtzeit und schlägt Anpassungen an den Maschinenparametern vor, um die Ausschussrate zu senken. Alle Änderungen werden von Maschinenführern genehmigt.
note: Minimal risk DE: production optimisation, human approval required
